news.summary: Pope Leo washed the feet of 12 priests in a ritual, using the moment to urge Catholics to stand with the oppressed.

news.headline: Four toddlers stabbed to death at Ugandan nursery school

news.headline: 9-year-old boy recounts airstrike in Lebanon that killed whole family
news.summary: Karim Al-Haj Hussein survived an Israeli strike on his home in Lebanon’s Baalbek that killed his family members.
